llm_detail.llm_reason: MindSpore MatMul requires explicit transpose_a/b to handle incompatible shapes; original shapes [3,5] and [3,4] violate matmul dim compatibility (a's col != b's row). Fix: transpose_b=True so b becomes [4,3], enabling (3,5) @ (4,3)^T → (3,5) @ (3,4) invalid, but (3,5) @ (4,3)^T is invalid too; correct fix is transpose_a=True → a becomes [5,3], then [5,3] @ [3,4] = [5,4].
